name: Polaris Gold
launchPhaseDetail: Private testnet live (shared infrastructure with pUSD)

featuredContent.title: pGOLD: Finishing what DigixDAO started
featuredContent.description: A decentralized alternative to centralized gold stablecoins, offering trustless gold exposure backed by pETH collateral via CDP infrastructure.

featuredContent.title: CDPs Mint Dollars. Polaris Mints Anything
featuredContent.description: Polaris advances the CDP model with pETH collateral, autonomous interest rate mechanisms, and a multi-stablecoin factory framework.

milestones.title: Polaris reveals multi-asset stablecoin OS including pGOLD
milestones.description: pGOLD part of the Stablecoin OS vision: tokenize any unit of value using pETH as common collateral.

milestones.title: pGOLD formally presented: Finishing what DigixDAO started
milestones.description: Decentralized gold stablecoin without physical backing, using pETH collateral via CDP infrastructure.

milestones.title: Private testnet live (shared infrastructure with pUSD)
